title: Tiny Aya: Bridging Scale and Multilingual Depth
authors: ['Alejandro R. Salamanca', 'Diana Abagyan', 'Daniel D\'souza', 'Sara Hooker', 'Julia Kreutzer', 'Marzieh Fadaee']
abstract: Tiny Aya redefines what a small multilingual language model can achieve. Trained on 70 languages and refined through region-aware posttraining, it delivers state-of-the-art in translation quality, strong multilingual understanding, and high-quality target-language generation, all with just 3.35B parameters.
relevance_reasoning: Directly addresses the low-resource double bind: a small (3.35B) model for 70 languages with region-aware posttraining.

title: Gemma 3 Technical Report
abstract: Multimodal model family spanning 1-27B parameters with expanded language support and 128K+ token context. The 4B instruction-tuned variant matches the 27B Gemma 2.
relevance_reasoning: Family from 1B-27B with multilingual support and distillation. 1B/4B directly relevant to edge.

title: TranslateGemma Technical Report
authors: ['Mara Finkelstein', 'Isaac Caswell', 'Tobias Domhan', 'Colin Cherry', 'Markus Freitag', 'David Vilar']
abstract: Open MT models built on Gemma 3 foundations via two-stage fine-tuning with RL, achieving gains over baseline across all sizes for 55+ language pairs.
relevance_reasoning: Open MT models on efficient Gemma 3 foundations for 55+ language pairs.

title: Nemotron 3 Nano: Open, Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Model for Agentic Reasoning
abstract: MoE hybrid Mamba-Transformer pretrained on 25T tokens. Better accuracy than Nemotron 2 Nano with less than half active params, 3.3x higher throughput, 1M context.
relevance_reasoning: Efficient small LM via MoE+Mamba hybrid. Relevant to edge but primarily English.

title: No Language Left Behind: Scaling Human-Centered Machine Translation
authors: ['NLLB Team', 'Marta R. Costa-jussà', 'James Cross', 'Onur Çelebi', 'Maha Elbayad']
abstract: MT for 200+ languages using MoE, with distilled 600M variant. 44% BLEU improvement over previous SOTA across 40,000 translation directions.
relevance_reasoning: MoE + distilled 600M variant for 200+ languages. Flagship efficient multilingual NLP.

title: The Llama 3 Herd of Models
abstract: Language models natively supporting multilinguality, coding, reasoning, and tool usage. Includes 1B and 3B small variants for edge deployment.
relevance_reasoning: 1B and 3B variants for edge with native multilingual support. Pruning+distillation.

title: EuroLLM: Multilingual Language Models for Europe
authors: ['Pedro Henrique Martins', 'Patrick Fernandes', 'João Alves', 'Nuno M. Guerreiro', 'Ricardo Rei']
abstract: Open-weight multilingual LLMs for all EU languages. Includes 1.7B model with multilingual tokenizer.
relevance_reasoning: Small (1.7B) multilingual model for European languages.

title: MaLA-500: Massive Language Adaptation of Large Language Models
authors: ['Peiqin Lin', 'Shaoxiong Ji', 'Jörg Tiedemann', 'André F. T. Martins', 'Hinrich Schütze']
abstract: LLM adapted to 534 languages via vocabulary extension and continued pretraining on LLaMA 2.
relevance_reasoning: Efficient adaptation of LLaMA 2 to 534 languages via vocabulary extension.

title: SeamlessM4T: Massively Multilingual & Multimodal Machine Translation
abstract: Single model for speech/text translation and ASR for 100 languages. 20% BLEU improvement over SOTA.
relevance_reasoning: Unified multilingual translation for 100 languages. Single-model more efficient than cascaded.

title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models
authors: ['Neha Sengupta', 'Sunil Kumar Sahu', 'Bokang Jia', 'Satheesh Katipomu', 'Haonan Li']
abstract: Open-source 13B Arabic-English bilingual LLM. Better Arabic knowledge and reasoning than existing open models.
relevance_reasoning: Arabic-centric bilingual model. Multilingual but not explicitly efficiency-focused.

title: Cendol: Open Instruction-tuned Generative Large Language Models for Indonesian Languages
authors: ['Samuel Cahyawijaya', 'Holy Lovenia', 'Fajri Koto', 'Rifki Afina Putri', 'Emmanuel Dave']
abstract: LLMs for Indonesian indigenous languages with 20% improvement. Parameter-efficient tuning and vocabulary adaptation.
relevance_reasoning: Parameter-efficient adaptation for Indonesian indigenous languages.
